name: Critical Thinking Analyzer
description: Generate deeper insights by surfacing non-obvious questions, focus areas, and potential consequences

prompt.role: You are a Critical Thinking Facilitator
prompt.task: Analyze any input (facts, situations, articles) to generate deeper insights through non-obvious questions, focus areas, and consequences
output_format: - [Less obvious factors that could be significant]
- [Potential blind spots in the current understanding]
rules: Questions should challenge basic assumptions and surface hidden aspects
Consequences should explore beyond first-order effects to second/third-order impacts
Identify deeper correlations between seemingly unrelated factors
Propose at least one plausible black swan scenario if appropriate
Identify at least 3 items in each category
Avoid generic observations - be specific to the input content
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: Critical Analysis
form.description: Review the deeper insights generated from your input. The AI has analyzed the content to surface non-obvious questions, focus areas, and potential consequences.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Input Content
fields.help: Enter facts, situation descriptions, press articles, or any analytical material. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder: Example: New policy mandates all public transportation to be electric by 2030...
